Bus Timings

Al Hawai Twin Towers Bus Stop: Dubai Location Guide

August 23, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Al Hawai Twin Towers Bus Stop in Dubai is a key transit point located in the bustling Al Nahda 2 area. This stop serves both residents and visitors, providing convenient access to various destinations within Dubai. Its strategic location makes it an essential part of the city’s public transportation network, connecting passengers to important landmarks, shopping centers, and dining options nearby.

Address

Al Nahda 2 Dubai United Arab Emirates

Map

View Google directions here.

Its strategic location ensures quick access to nearby attractions, dining options, and essential services, making travel convenient for everyone.

Bus Routes and Timings

The following bus routes service the Al Hawai Twin Towers Bus Stop, with frequent departures throughout the day:

Bus Route Bus Station Timings
F21 Al Nahda MS 5:28 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 5:38 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 5:46 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 5:56 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 6:07 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 6:18 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 6:28 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 6:39 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 6:49 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 6:59 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 7:09 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 7:19 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 7:29 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 7:39 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 7:49 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 7:59 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 8:09 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 8:17 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 8:27 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 8:37 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 8:47 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 8:57 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 9:07 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 9:21 PM
F21 Al Nahda MS 9:32 PM

Bus Route Details

The F21 route offers crucial connectivity to Al Nahda Metro Station (MS), ensuring frequent and reliable service throughout the day. Buses on this route maintain a consistent schedule, providing ample travel options for both daily commuters and those heading to and from Al Nahda. With regular departures, the F21 route supports smooth and convenient transit within the area.

Nearby Destinations

The Al Hawai Twin Towers Bus Stop is ideally situated close to various amenities, making it a practical stop for passengers. Its proximity to restaurants, landmarks, shopping centers, and healthcare facilities enhances the convenience for travelers. Nearby destinations include:

Restaurants

  • Palm Valley Restaurant: Offers a range of delectable dishes in a relaxed setting.

  • Donaza Restaurant: Known for its flavorful cuisine and comfortable dining experience.
  • Hot Time Restaurant: Provides a selection of spicy and savory dishes.
  • Food Village Restaurant: Features a diverse menu catering to various tastes.
  • Calicut Chef Restaurant: Specializes in authentic South Indian cuisine.
  • Madras Vegetarian Restaurant: Renowned for its vegetarian fare and traditional flavors.
  • Chili’s Restaurant: A popular chain offering American-style dishes and beverages.
  • Gothai Restaurant: Serves a variety of Thai dishes in a casual atmosphere.
  • Pak Darbar Restaurant: Known for its Pakistani cuisine and friendly service.

Landmarks

  • Dubai Carmel School: A prominent educational institution in the vicinity.

  • Al Dona Building: A notable structure within the area.
  • Mirage Tower: A recognizable building in the neighborhood.
  • Syed Bin Sabar Apartments: Residential apartments near the bus stop.
  • Al Ghaya Building: Another significant landmark in the area.
  • Oxygen Fitness Centre: A popular fitness facility for health enthusiasts.
  • Rashid Bakhit Twin Towers: Twin towers offering office and residential spaces.
  • Salma Tower: A well-known tower located close to the bus stop.
  • Al Radha Trading Co (LLC): A local trading company.
  • Irfad Dubai: A local business entity.
  • RTA Padi Parking: A nearby parking facility managed by the RTA.
  • Massage Spa Duy No. 11: A spa offering massage and relaxation services.
  • Nahda Home: Residential area nearby.
Recommended Guides

Shopping Centers

  • Big Mart: A large supermarket offering a wide range of products.

  • Shaklan Market: A local market known for various goods.
  • Carrefour Market: A well-known supermarket chain with diverse offerings.
  • Fresh Spot Supermarket LLC: A supermarket providing fresh produce and groceries.
  • New West Zone Supermarket - Nahda 4: A popular shopping destination for daily needs.
  • Authentic Store LLC Shopping Mall: A mall with various retail stores.
  • Mammooss Nahda: A shopping center offering various retail options.
  • Count Dubai Shopping Mall: A local mall featuring numerous shops and eateries.

Healthcare

  • Holistic Healthcare LLC: Provides a range of medical services with a holistic approach.

  • HealthHub Clinic Al Nahda: A clinic offering comprehensive healthcare services.

Pharmacies

  • Life Pharmacy: Offers a variety of pharmaceuticals and health products.

  • Aster Pharmacy: Known for its extensive range of medications and health services.
  • Aster Pharmacy 148: A branch of Aster Pharmacy with additional services.
  • Bio Vista Pharmacy: Provides a selection of medicines and health-related products.
  • Aster Pharmacy 200: Another branch of Aster Pharmacy catering to local needs.
  • Novo Nahda Sahara Pharmacy: Offers pharmaceutical products and services.
  • Life Pharmacy Real 5: A pharmacy known for its customer service and product range.
  • Alexandria Pharmacy: Provides a range of medicines and health supplies.
  • Life Pharmacy - Life Al Nahda: A branch focused on comprehensive pharmacy services.
  • Life Pharmacy - New Al Nahda: Offers essential medications and health products.

Accommodation

  • Emirates Star Hotel Apartments Dubai: Offers comfortable and convenient accommodations.

  • Samaya Apartments: Provides residential options for both short and long stays.
  • Newras Hotel Apartments: Features well-equipped apartments for visitors.

Nearby Stops

  1. Dubai Carmel School 1(137m): 13D, 24, F08, F22, F24, X13, X22

  2. Dubai Carmel School 2(162m): 13D, F22, F24, X22

  3. Ahli House 1(214m): 18, F21

  4. Al Noor Building 2(224m): 18, F21

  5. Al Shawi Tower(303m): F21

The Al Hawai Twin Towers Bus Stop is more than just a transit point; it’s a gateway to numerous amenities and attractions in the Al Nahda area. Whether you’re commuting for work, exploring the city, or taking care of daily errands, this bus stop offers a convenient and well-connected option for navigating Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 23, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
